message:
fix(core): resolve alias-qualified column references in UPDATE/DELETE col_map

The DELETE and UPDATE col_map was always built with the raw table name,
causing alias-qualified column references (e.g. `t.dept` when `FROM table
AS t`) to fail resolution. Now uses the alias as the effective table label
when one is present.

Also adds clippy::unnecessary_wraps allow on execute_single_join to
suppress false positive from the Result return type.

Tests added for GROUP BY with table alias star expansion and alias-
qualified column references in GROUP BY aggregate queries.

Beads: synced issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
